name: spousal-joint-baseline-60ltv
anchor: Spousal-joint baseline at standard 60% LTV (control case)
rationale: Spousal-joint applicants at 60% LTV with NO band callout / NO correction / NO contradiction / clean docs. Pure F1 aggregation control case. Pair with F01 (joint + MP correction) and F08 (joint + 85% + QC + correction) to fully characterize joint-applicant handling.
notes: Single-event sequence. Joint-applicant baseline; assertion focus on canonical_map borrower_name aggregation shape.
